name: Rabbit Curry
recipeInstructions:
1. Brush rabbit pieces with melted butter.
2. Dredge in flour. Salt and pepper pieces.
3. Bake on rack, turning at least once until rabbit is tender. Cool and debone rabbit.
4. Saute onion and apple in remaining butter or margarine.
5. Add 1/4 cup of flour. Stirring until lumps are smoothed out.
6. Slowly add chicken broth and sour cream, stirring constantly.
7. Simmer over low heat until blended.
8. Add lemon peel, curry powder, deboned rabbit and heat thoroughly.
9. Serve over rice.
